items.title: Add Fastjson 1.2.83 jar: protocol RCE environment (#793)
items.summary:
Add Fastjson 1.2.83 jar: protocol RCE environment (#793)

* Add Fastjson 1.2.83 jar: protocol RCE environment

Reproduces remote command execution on Fastjson 1.2.83 with autoType
disabled and no gadget classes, abusing the JVM jar: protocol and
Linux /proc/self/fd. Mirrors the existing 1.2.24/1.2.47 environment
layout. poc.py builds the jar:-named class in pure Python, hosts it,
and drives the two-stage download + fd spray; it also keeps an
out-of-band scan subcommand for harmless detection.

items.summary:
Overview 
 Duplicati v2.3.0.1 is vulnerable to arbitrary code execution when installed outside the default  C:\Program Files\Duplicati 2\  directory. An attacker with local user privileges who can write files to the Duplicati installation directory can execute arbitrary code by placing malicious files, such as DLLs, in that directory.
